_comment: Bundled curated add-on catalog. Used when the remote registry is unreachable (offline / not yet published). Built-in entries point at features already in the cockpit; external entries are third-party tools/plugins the user installs on their own machine (see the disclaimer in the Add-ons tab). Entries that carry a url+sha256 are installable front-end plugins; everything else is informational only.

plugins.name: 3D layer view
plugins.description: True 3D rendering of the chip's physical layer stack is done by desktop tools (GDS3D). The Layout tab's "3D model" launches your installed 3D viewer on the run's GDS. Install GDS3D below to enable it.

plugins.name: 2D layout view
plugins.description: The Layout tab shows the flow's rendered layout with pan/zoom, and one-click opens the GDS in KLayout/Magic for interactive 2D inspection. Built in.

plugins.name: Standard-cell library browser
plugins.description: Browse the selected PDK's standard cells grouped by kind. Built in — open the Cells tab (pick the PDK/SCL in Setup first).

plugins.name: Graphviz (synthesis diagrams)
plugins.description: Renders Yosys .dot synthesis schematics to SVG on the Preview tab. Install graphviz (the `dot` binary) on the machine running the GUI. Third-party tool — installed on your own machine.

plugins.name: GDS3D (desktop 3D layout viewer)
plugins.description: A native desktop OpenGL viewer for GDSII with the PDK layer stack. Downloaded from and maintained by a third party; install and run it on your own machine.

plugins.name: librelane_summary (HTML report)
plugins.description: A third-party post-run HTML summary (layout, DRC, cell usage, multi-run compare). Maintained externally by mattvenn; run it against your run directory.
